gcp.cloudsearch.operations.get.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

required.description: The name of the operation resource.

can_come_from.note: [tier 3/field_match] call gcp.cloudsearch.settings.searchapplications.list, iterate response["searchApplications"][], extract item["name"] → fill {operationId}

gcp.cloudsearch.operations.lro.list.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

required.description: The name of the operation's parent resource.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

can_come_from.note: [tier 3/field_match] call gcp.cloudsearch.settings.searchapplications.list, iterate response["searchApplications"][], extract item["name"] → fill {operationId}

gcp.cloudsearch.debug.datasources.items..description: Checks whether an item is accessible by specified principal. Principal must be a user; groups and domain values aren't supported. **Note:** This API requires an admin account to execute.

required.description: Item name, format: datasources/{source_id}/items/{item_id}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.cloudsearch.settings.datasources.list, iterate response["sources"][], extract item["name"] → fill {datasourceId}
[tier 1/exact] call gcp.cloudsearch.debug.identitysources.items.listForunmappedidentity, iterate response["itemNames"][], extract item["None"] → fill {itemId}

gcp.cloudsearch.debug.datasources.items..description: Fetches the item whose viewUrl exactly matches that of the URL provided in the request. **Note:** This API requires an admin account to execute.

required.description: Source name, format: datasources/{source_id}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.cloudsearch.settings.datasources.list, iterate response["sources"][], extract item["name"] → fill {datasourceId}

gcp.cloudsearch.debug.datasources.items..description: List all unmapped identities for a specific item. **Note:** This API requires an admin account to execute.

required.description: The name of the item, in the following format: datasources/{source_id}/items/{ID}
